actions: Lock the 6 cost components in production config
Validate proxy demand against 1 quarter of pilot enterprise data
Establish hub_role rubric with operations team
expected_impact: Engine ready for pilot; no infra changes yet.

actions: Open GW_BULKY hub (lease 60k m2 yard, 6-month contract)
Reroute Jeju and Jeonnam flows away from BS_PORT
expected_impact: Jeju SLA violations from 42% -> 18%. BS_PORT peak utilization from 95% -> 78%.

actions: Activate SJ_SECURE for Durables_Electronics flows (Q4 prep)
Stand up US_CROSSDOCK for Industrial_Materials handling
Migrate 30% of Gyeongbuk overflow to GB_OVERFLOW
expected_impact: GG_METRO peak from 110% -> 85%. Durables_Electronics quarterly cycle absorbed without overflow.

actions: Run engine quarterly on real shipment data
Retire legacy assumptions; transition seasonal_playbook from heuristic to STL
Plan expansion: add 1-2 candidate hubs based on demand forecast
expected_impact: Engine moves from proxy to production mode. Annual saving validated against pilot data.
